dsl_rule.translation_notes: Used ema_20 as the 20-day exponential (EMA is exponential moving average). Used prev_low for 'yesterday's low'. Used rsi_7 as closest available RSI period to the specified 10-day RSI (rsi_14 available but rsi_10 not in allowed list; rsi_7 is the closest match). Exit condition inferred as RSI crossing above 50 since AUTHOR_SILENT was specified.

backtest_rule.reason: Used ema_20 as the 20-day exponential (EMA is exponential moving average). Used prev_low for 'yesterday's low'. Used rsi_7 as closest available RSI period to the specified 10-day RSI (rsi_14 available but rsi_10 not in allowed list; rsi_7 is the closest match). Exit condition inferred as RSI crossing above 50 since AUTHOR_SILENT was specified.

source_rule_text: Buy on weakness when a 20-day exponential is less than yesterday's low AND a 10-day RSI is less than 50.
